title: Droid Army (disambiguation)
content:
A '''Droid Army''' was a large, organized group of [[battle droid]]s, [[security droid]]s, and/or [[assassin droid]]s that was created for the single purpose of battle. There were several [[droid]] armies in the history of [[the galaxy]].

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Geonosian droid army]]
*[[IG-series battle droid army]]
*[[Klik-Klak's droid army]]
*[[Malastare droid army]]
*[[Ramil's droid army]]
*[[Retail Caucus droid army]]
*[[Separatist Droid Army]]
*[[Techno Union Droid Army]]
*[[Trade Federation Droid Army]]
*[[The Marching Horde]]
